form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 388m at this track beaten 7 lengths (22.97) behind Done Dealing in a Grade 4/5 on March 31. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame two times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th over 388m at this track beaten 7 lengths (22.97) behind Done Dealing in a Grade 4/5 on March 31. Had been in strong form, hitting the frame two times on end, before the latest effort. Can atone.

form.formComment: Jumped well at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at The Gardens last start over 400m from this same draw. Rates among the chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Jumped well at this track two runs back then again settled forward and finished second at The Gardens last start over 400m from this same draw. Rates among the chances this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was bumped and carried wider rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (18.74) over 330m at Temora. Drawn close to the inside. One of the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (18.74) over 330m at Temora. Drawn close to the inside. One of the better hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Entering the back straight, galloped onto the hind quarters.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 3.5 lengths third (23.22) over 400m at The Gardens. Consistent record from this draw. Solid chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 3.5 lengths third (23.22) over 400m at The Gardens. Consistent record from this draw. Solid chance.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording four minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (23.17) over 400m at The Gardens. Overdue and expected to feature again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Racing well without winning, recording four minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when second (23.17) over 400m at The Gardens. Overdue and expected to feature again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked rounding the turn into the front straight and marred.

form.formComment: Placed last time (22.47) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing second and beaten 0.8 lengths. Box stats strong with three wins and two placings from six starts. Others appear better placed.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (22.47) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing second and beaten 0.8 lengths. Box stats strong with three wins and two placings from six starts. Others appear better placed.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.55) when sixth over 388m at this track in a Mix 1/2/3. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from three starts. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (22.55) when sixth over 388m at this track in a Mix 1/2/3. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from three starts. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished last on April 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind Barramundi Lou beaten 10 lengths (23.57) in a Free For All. Has performed below expectations at his last couple but is capable of far better.
